name: Tricentis Test Automation REST API
what_it_does: Tricentis continuous testing and test automation REST API for enterprises to manage automated test execution, test case management, CI/CD pipeline integration, performance testing, and AI-powered test optimization — enabling automated software quality assurance across SAP, Salesforce, and custom enterprise applications through Tricentis's model-based test automation platform. Enables AI agents to manage test execution for automated test run trigger and monitoring automation, handle test case management for test case creation, update, and version management automation, access CI/CD integration for pipeline-triggered test execution and result reporting automation, retrieve defect management for test failure defect creation and tracking automation, manage test suite management for test suite organization and scheduling automation, handle visual testing for UI regression and visual diff testing automation, access performance testing for load test configuration and execution automation, retrieve test analytics for test result trend and quality metric automation, manage requirement traceability for test-to-requirement coverage automation, and integrate Tricentis with JIRA, Azure DevOps, Jenkins, and SAP for continuous testing automation.
use_cases: Triggering automated regression test suites in CI/CD pipelines for DevOps automation agents
Managing SAP ERP test scenarios and test data for SAP transformation automation agents
Monitoring test execution status and reporting quality metrics for QA automation agents
Running API and UI regression tests for release validation automation agents
not_for: Open-source test framework management (Tricentis is enterprise commercial; Selenium, Playwright, and Cypress serve open-source test automation)
Individual developers without enterprise QA programs (Tricentis is enterprise-grade; simpler tools serve individual developer testing)
Performance testing at massive scale without enterprise infrastructure (Tricentis performance testing is enterprise-grade, not cloud-native consumer scale)
best_when: An enterprise QA or DevOps team wanting AI agents to automate continuous testing workflows, CI/CD test integration, and quality metrics reporting — especially for SAP or Salesforce enterprise applications — through Tricentis's model-based enterprise test automation platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE LICENSE REQUIRED: Tricentis serves enterprise customers; automated open-developer assumption creates license_required; Tricentis requires enterprise agreement; automated must have Tricentis license. MODEL-BASED TESTING REQUIRES SETUP: Tricentis Tosca uses model-based testing (not scripted); automated scripted-test assumption creates model_not_configured for test execution without Tricentis test case models; automated must build Tosca test models before executing via API. SAP TESTING IS SPECIALIZED: Tricentis has deep SAP testing capabilities; automated generic-test assumption creates test_gap for SAP-specific test scenarios requiring Tricentis's SAP connectors and SAP-aware test models; automated must use SAP-specific Tricentis modules for SAP testing. TRICENTIS PLATFORM SUITE IS BROAD: Tricentis offers Tosca (functional), NeoLoad (performance), Testim (cloud AI), Smarteye (visual); automated single-platform assumption creates capability_gap for organizations needing multiple testing types; automated must configure correct Tricentis product per testing need.

auth.notes: Tricentis uses OAuth2 for Test Automation REST API. REST API with JSON. Austin, TX HQ (Vienna, Austria origin). Founded 2007 by Wolfgang Platz. Investors: Vista Equity Partners. $1.5B+ valuation. Products: Tricentis Tosca (model-based testing), Tricentis NeoLoad (performance), Tricentis Testim (AI-powered), Tricentis Smarteye (visual). 3,000+ enterprise customers. SAP testing specialization. Competes with Broadcom (Micro Focus UFT), Micro Focus ALM, and Selenium ecosystem for enterprise test automation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Tricentis Testim: free tier available for limited tests; Tosca requires enterprise license
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; Tosca per-user and per-execution; enterprise custom pricing; NeoLoad usage-based
pricing.notes: Austin TX. Vista Equity Partners backed. $1.5B+ valuation. 3,000+ enterprise customers. SAP testing specialist.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; test execution APIs throttled per license and agent capacity

known_agent_gotchas: EXECUTION LISTS REQUIRE AGENT: Tricentis Tosca test executions require configured test agent/DEX agent; automated agentless assumption creates execution_pending for test runs without available execution agent; automated must ensure test agents are running and available

TEST CASE IDs DIFFER BY PRODUCT: Tricentis Tosca, Testim, and NeoLoad use different test case ID formats; automated unified-id assumption creates test_not_found for IDs from one product used with another; automated must use product-specific test IDs

EXECUTION STATUS IS POLLED: Tricentis test execution completes asynchronously; automated sync-result assumption creates incomplete_result for status checks before execution completes; automated must poll execution status until terminal state (Passed, Failed, Error)

SAP TEST CASES REQUIRE SAP SYSTEM CONNECTIVITY: SAP-specific Tricentis tests require connection to SAP system; automated offline-test assumption creates connection_timeout for SAP tests without active SAP system connectivity; automated must ensure SAP system is accessible during test execution

DEFECT CREATION REQUIRES INTEGRATION CONFIG: Automatic defect creation in JIRA/ALM requires configured integration; automated auto-defect assumption creates no_defect_created for test failures without pre-configured defect management integration; automated must configure defect management integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise test automation. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Test case and quality metrics data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Test automation. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Test case and quality assurance data.
